message:
feat(fwc): add audit command wiring and CUAL benchmark suite (+149 tests)

- Add audit_cmd.rs (127 tests): connector compliance matrix, gap analysis,
  FCP2/FCP3 compliance checking with severity filtering and TOON/JSON output
- Add bench_helpers.rs (22 tests): performance benchmarks for search, batch,
  pipeline, schema validation, and recovery operations with timing reports

Total fwc: 15,256 tests (14,072 unit + 1,147 lib + 28 integration + 9 fixtures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
